basics.name: Arya Koureshi
basics.label: Senior AI Engineer | Full-Stack Developer
basics.summary: Senior AI Engineer and Full-Stack Developer with approximately two years of product-development experience at Done Institute. I build applied AI, computer vision, biomedical signal-processing, and React/Node.js products from concept to production.

education.area: Artificial intelligence, machine learning, and biomedical signal/image analysis
EEG/BCI, motor imagery, computational neuroscience, and brain-machine interfaces

work.position: Senior AI Engineer and Full-Stack Developer
work.summary: Product engineering, applied AI, and end-to-end web delivery across DoneProject, DoneGram, and Daramhavato.
highlights: Delivered React and Node.js platforms from product structure and reusable UI to APIs, deployment, and post-launch iteration.
Built request, account, file-submission, tracking, and operational workflows.
Bridged AI experimentation with production engineering and product constraints.

work.company: Ghazizadeh Lab and Sharif Brain Center
work.summary: Developing real-time motor-imagery EEG pipelines for BCI and exoskeleton-oriented control.
highlights: EEG preprocessing, feature extraction, classification, denoising, and visualization.
CSP/FBCSP, CCA, P300/SSVEP, GEVD/DSS, PSD, STFT, and source-localization workflows.

work.position: Teaching Assistant — Learning in Brain and Machine
work.summary: Supporting instruction in neural computation, brain-inspired learning, artificial neural networks, and machine learning.
